title: Tim's Ultimately Comprehensive Cobblemon Edits of Destiny
description: Fixes some stuff in the Cobblemon mod that can be fixed with a datapack/resourcepack solution.
body:
Fixes some stuff in the Cobblemon mod that can be fixed with a datapack/resourcepack solution.

This addon allows the Cobblemon devs to focus on their work making bigger versions, while still supporting issues that might pop up in the current version and be fixed in future versions, without having to wait for said future version.

# 1.6.1

## Water/Lava Tag

Fixes spawns that required a block with the tag of water or lava nearby to use the actual water/water_flowing/lava/lava_flowing blocks, as Cobblemon does not yet support using block tags for this condition.

This fixes the spawns of:
squirtle, wartortle, blastoise, psyduck, golduck, poliwag, poliwhirl, poliwrath, slowpoke, slowbro, magmar, vaporeon, dragonite, politoed, wooper, quagsire, slowking, slugma, magcargo, magby, bidoof, bibarel, magmortar, ducklett, swanna, froakie, frogadier, greninja, goomy, sliggoo, goodra, salandit, salazzle, wimpod, golisopod, sobble, drizzile, inteleon, cramorant, quaxly, quaxwell, quaquaval, flamigo, clodsire

## Nero Whiscash

Fixed Nero Whiscash not spawning when you fish with a masterball Poke Rod.

## Hisuian Goomy -> Hisuian Sliggoo Evolution

Fixed Hisuian Goomy not evolving into Hisuian Sliggoo when in the overworld. Now, you just can't be in a swamp.

## Heart Wooper

Fixed Heart Wooper not spawning when you fish with a love ball. It had the wrong/an invalid aspect on it.
